_comment: Official Google Analytics MCP server (googleanalytics/google-analytics-mcp), wrapping the live GA4 Data API. Read-only via the analytics.readonly ADC scope (see SETUP.md). Merge: claude -> .mcp.json mcpServers, cursor -> .cursor/mcp.json mcpServers, codex_toml -> append to .codex/config.toml. Verify the exact install command against the upstream repo.
